mapper.select: SELECT id, dept_id, course_name, course_code, teacher_name, semester, student_count, status, username, created_at, updated_at FROM course ORDER BY id
SELECT id, dept_id, course_name, course_code, teacher_name, semester, student_count, status, username, created_at, updated_at FROM course WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} ORDER BY id
SELECT password FROM course WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM course WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
